CSVTools.description: Tools for handling CSV files, including reading, writing, and manipulating CSV data.

functions.read_csv: Read the contents of a csv file specified by a path.
functions.write_to_csv: Write new content to a csv file specified by a path. Content should be formatted similar to [{"col_a": "val_a"}, {"col_b": "val_b"}] where "col_a" and "col_b" are column names and in the column_names parameter. This tool will overwrite the previous content of the csv file.
functions.append_to_csv: Append new content to a csv file specified by a path. Content should be formatted similar to [{"col_a": "val_a"}, {"col_b": "val_b"}] where "col_a" and "col_b" are column names and in the column_names parameter.

TXTTools.description: Tools for handling text files, including reading, writing, and searching text files.

functions.read_txt: Read the contents of a txt file specified by a path.
functions.read_txt_lines: Read the contents of a txt file specified by a path as a list of lines.
functions.write_to_txt: Write new content to a txt file specified by a path. This tool will overwrite the previous content of the txt file.
functions.append_to_txt: Write new content to a txt file specified by a path. This tool will append the new content to a new line after the previous content of the txt file.
functions.clear: Clear the contents of a file specified by a path.

DirectoryTools.description: Tools for managing directories, including creating, deleting, and listing directory contents.

functions.get_directory_content: Get the contents of a directory specified by a path.
functions.create_directory: Create a new directory specified by a path.

TraversalTools.description: Tools for traversing file systems, including navigating through directories and finding files.

functions.depth_first_search: Performs a depth-first search (DFS) through the filesystem. The path(s) to matching file(s) or directories, or an informative message if not found.
functions.breadth_first_search: Performs a breadth-first search (BFS) through the filesystem. The path(s) to matching file(s) or directories, or an informative message if not found.

search_args.source_directory: The directory path from which the search will commence.
search_args.target_name: The name of the file or directory to search for. Defaults to '' if unspecified.
search_args.approximate: A boolean indicating whether to use approximate/fuzzy matching (True) or exact matching (False). Defaults to False.
